q: Which payment methods are growing fastest this month compared to last month? Show percentage growth.
sql:
SELECT 
    payment_method, 
    COALESCE(
        (
            (SUM(CASE WHEN transaction_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
            / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN transaction_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND transaction_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) 
            - 1
        ) * 100.0
        ), 0) AS growth_percentage 
FROM 
    silver_transactions 
WHERE 
    transaction_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '2 months') 
    AND transaction_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month' 
    AND payment_method IS NOT NULL 
    AND amount IS NOT NULL 
    AND quality_flag = 'valid' 
GROUP BY 
    payment_method 
ORDER BY 
    growth_percentage DESC;

q: Which 5 merchants have the highest refund rate? Show refund count and total transaction count.
sql: SELECT m.merchant_id, m.merchant_name, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN st.status = 'REFUNDED' THEN st.transaction_id END) AS refund_count, COUNT(DISTINCT st.transaction_id) AS total_transaction_count, COALESCE((COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN st.status = 'REFUNDED' THEN st.transaction_id END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT st.transaction_id), 0)) * 100, 0) AS refund_rate FROM merchants m JOIN silver_transactions st ON m.merchant_id = st.merchant_id WHERE st.quality_flag = 'valid' AND st.transaction_date BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) AND CURRENT_DATE AND st.status = 'REFUNDED' GROUP BY m.merchant_id, m.merchant_name ORDER BY refund_rate DESC LIMIT 5;
